titleStmt.title: SII 34.349: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 349. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the rock-cut cave in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Mallikārjna-Virūpāksharāya, Śaka 1415, Ānanda, Vṛiśchika, sudi, . . ., Monday = A.D. 1494, November.

This records the sale of a village to the temple of Kuṉṟākkuḍi-uḍaiya-Nāyiṉār in Vaḍa-Paṉaṅgāḍu-nāḍu a part of Kāṭṭu-nāḍu alias Jayasiṅgakulakāla-vaḷanāḍu. The sellers were Tirumalaiyirāsa-āriyachchakkiṟavatti and others, who seemed to have got the village as part of their amara-nāyakattaṉam from the present king. The end part is completely worn out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī mahāmaṇḍalīśvara hariyarāya vibhāṭan pāṣaikkut tappum Irayarakaṇḍan mūvarāyarakaṇṭan kaṇṭanāṭu
koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātān pūṟuvatekṣiṇapaccima Uttirattu camuttirātipati Emmaṇṭalamuṅ ko
ṇṭaruḷi kecavēṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrī vīrapratāpa tēvarāya mahā Irāyar kumāraṉ mallikār
cciṉa yirāyar viruppākṣayirāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa cakāttam 10 415
mēlcellā niṉṟa Āṉanta caṅvarcarattu viṟuccika nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu yum peṟṟa
cōmavārattu nāḷ kāṭṭu nāṭu Āṉa ceyaciṅka kulakālavaḷa nāṭṭu vaṭapaṉaṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiru
kkuṉ ṟākkuṭi Uṭaiyanayiṉāṟkku mīyceṅkiḷi nāṭṭu mullaivāyiluṭaiya
tirumalaiyirāca Āriyaccakkiṟavatti Uḷḷiṭṭāru maṇivāṇar Āṉa Āriyacakkiṟavaṟtti Uḷḷiṭṭārum
Ūṟkāṇi Āṭcivilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paṭi ttāṉ
Āriyaccakkaravatti paṇa Uṭaiyar cantiṟātittavaraikkum Amara nāyakattaṉa kuṭutta
mallitēva maka Irācaṉ Eṅkaḷukku kallu veṭṭi
vakaiyil Inta kuṭi Iraṇṭu malai nāṭṭut tampiḷḷaiyār
Digital edition of SII 34.349 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
